problem.title: CT-ICP cluster A simplified recipe transfer to MulRan parkinglot full
problem.question: KITTI seq 00/05/08 share cluster A (map=50 + c2f σ×2). Does this transfer to MulRan parkinglot, where existing best is 14.36 m WITH GT seed using ms_chol full recipe and bare without GT seed gets 74-81 m? Test cluster A both with and without GT seed.

variants.label: cluster A (map=50 + c2f σ×2), no GT seed
variants.intent: Fair cross-dataset transfer of seq 00 winner. Hits dense_window 74.58 m baseline?

variants.label: cluster A (map=50 + c2f σ×2) + GT seed
variants.intent: Best-case test. Beats ms_chol_gt_seed_best 14.36 m or does seq 00 recipe lose to ms_chol on this dataset?

variants.label: cluster A + ms_chol + GT seed
variants.intent: Recipes might combine. Does map=50 + c2f added to ms_chol full beat 14.36 m?
